title: avena cespitosa altissima
intro: Avena cespitosa altissima, also known as oat grass or oat straw, is a type of grass that belongs to the Avena genus of oats. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Avena cespitosa altissima include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting overall gut health. Avena cespitosa altissima is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
